For Faculty & Staff

For the people who make ICI work

Teaching coaching well is demanding, and so is running the institute behind it. This area gives faculty and staff quick access to what they need.

Quick access

Log in to access your dashboard, secure documents, and scheduling systems.

Staff login
Teaching schedules and student information
Faculty resources and materials
Supervision and faculty development
Internal systems and tools
Operations and support contacts

Join the faculty

We are always interested in practising coaches who can teach with rigour and humanity. If that is you, we would like to hear from you.

Express interest in teaching

The International Coaching Institute trains and certifies coaches one-to-one, online, blending coaching craft with leadership, psychology, neuroscience and human behaviour. Become the coach people trust.
